tasks.label: RFMONO: Deploy to EdgeTX simulator SD
tasks.command:
$sdRoot = '${config:rfmono.simulatorSdRoot}'
	if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $sdRoot)) { throw "Simulator SD root not found: $sdRoot" }
$target = Join-Path -Path $sdRoot -ChildPath 'SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY'
$targetLib = Join-Path -Path $target -ChildPath 'lib'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $target | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $targetLib | Out-Null
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\RFMONO.lua' -Destination (Join-Path -Path $target -ChildPath 'RFMONO.lua') -Force
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\lib\config.lua' -Destination (Join-Path -Path $targetLib -ChildPath 'config.lua') -Force
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\lib\layout.lua' -Destination (Join-Path -Path $targetLib -ChildPath 'layout.lua') -Force
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\lib\sensors.lua' -Destination (Join-Path -Path $targetLib -ChildPath 'sensors.lua') -Force
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\lib\alerts.lua' -Destination (Join-Path -Path $targetLib -ChildPath 'alerts.lua') -Force
Write-Host "RFMONO deployed to $target"
